message:
Command `# antenna.rpt has only the "No OR_DEFAULT vias defined" message = 0 antenna violations!
# So check_antennas passed. The failure must be in write_views or something after.
# Let's check if an ODB was written

find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/ -type f
echo "---"
# Check the or_metrics_out.json for hints
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/or_metrics_out.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | tail -20` executed with exit code 0.
